rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be in component type scopes unless they are implementation-level bindings.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope rules during AGREE fusion: do not introduce invalid references or package-qualified identifiers.
Use only identifiers and types present in the analyzed AADL model for AGREE annex content.
Do not assume or invent numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for structural assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not place port-based assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes unless they are bindings.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or AADL properties as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
